name: How do I know if my answer engine optimization examples are actually working?
description: Your AEO examples are working when you see more featured snippets, People Also Ask placements, AI overview mentions, and citations in tools like ChatGPT or Perp

mainEntity.name: How do I know if my answer engine optimization examples are actually working?

acceptedAnswer.text:
Answer engine optimization examples are working when your brand starts appearing in featured snippets, People Also Ask boxes, AI overviews, and citations inside tools like ChatGPT or Perplexity. You’ll often see higher impressions for question queries, sometimes with flat or lower clicks.

The goal is visibility and recommendation, not just traditional traffic metrics.

Key factors:
- Increased snippet and answer-box presence for your target questions.
- Mentions or citations of your domain in AI chat or overview responses.
- Growth in branded search and direct visits over time.
- Positive feedback from users who “found you via AI.”

Set up a simple tracking routine: search key questions across multiple engines monthly, record whether you’re cited, and monitor impressions vs clicks. Complement this with qualitative data from customer intake forms.

If you see answer visibility rising, your AEO examples are doing their job—even if standard SEO dashboards don’t fully capture the impact yet.
acceptedAnswer.description: Your AEO examples are working when you see more featured snippets, People Also Ask placements, AI overview mentions, and citations in tools like ChatGPT or Perplexity for your target questions. Track these appearances regularly and watch for increases in branded search and direct traffic.
